suggestions.title: Request the GCP IAM export ahead of the July 17 session
suggestions.description: Anjali confirmed the export verbally on July 2 but no formal evidence request has been logged. Recommend raising the request now so it is not the blocking item at the session itself.
recommendations: Log a formal evidence request for the GCP IAM configuration export.
